name: Salad Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
THIS DRESSING IS VERY GOOD OVER A SPINACH SALAD
DRESSING MIX: In a small bowl, combine all ingredients and stir until evenly distributed. Transfer to a 1/2-cup container with a tight-fitting lid or wrap tightly in heavy-duty foil. Seal the container. Label with date and contents. Store in a cool, dry place. Use within 3 months. Makes 1 package or about 1/3 cup of Salad Dressing Mix.
SALAD DRESSING: In a medium bowl, set aside cottage cheese. In a blender, combine Salad Dressing Mix, vegetable oil, and vinegar. Blend for 5 to 8 seconds. Pour over cottage cheese and fold until just blended. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes before serving. YIELD: About 3 cups.
